offer: For Shopify sellers processing 10–20 invoices/month, manual data aggregation causes late reports. We automate report generation instead of manual data entry and spreadsheet management.
problem: Manual aggregation of sales data leads to time-consuming report generation.
channels_free: Post in Reddit communities for Shopify sellers
Indie Hackers posts about similar workflows
DM outreach to Shopify sellers with demo video
Community forums for sharing tools among sellers
try_it: Let users try customizable report templates on 1-3 items
pay: unknown with a clear upgrade path
cheap_execution_checklist: Create a landing page with one-liner and CTA
Produce a demo video of manual workflow
Conduct 10 short interviews with target users
Offer early-access onboarding for first 10 users
Share weekly progress updates in relevant communities
automation_simplification_ideas: One-click export of a simple report
